hero.headline: From travel idea to a sales-ready proposal — in a single conversation.
hero.subheadline: Emilia is Vibook's conversational interface. It plans and quotes trips in natural language, turning user intent into structured plans or actionable quotes — connected to multiple travel-industry providers.
hero.moat: Emilia is not a travel tool. It's the interface that connects the intent to travel with the decision to book.
hero.microcopy: No forms. No friction. Just conversation.

scene.userMessage: I want to go to Cancún from January 10 to 18, we're 2 adults and 2 kids, quad room
scene.assistantMessage: Got it. I'm organizing your Cancún trip — January 10–18, 2 adults + 2 kids, quad room.

whatIsEmilia.headline: A new way to understand and sell travel.
whatIsEmilia.subheadline: Emilia turns a conversation into a clear travel structure. From a first idea to a proposal ready to send — all in natural language. Not just inspiration: planning, structuring and quoting in a single interface.

cards.title: Plans
cards.copy: Understands the trip intent and turns it into a clear structure.

cards.title: Structures
cards.copy: Organizes destinations, dates, passengers and rooms into actionable data.

cards.title: Quotes
cards.copy: Generates send-ready proposals, connected to your providers.

realExample.headline: This is Emilia in action.
realExample.subheadline: A single sentence is enough for Emilia to interpret dates, passengers and room type, and to assemble the proposal.
realExample.userMessage: I want to go to Cancún from January 10 to 18, we're 2 adults and 2 kids, quad room
realExample.assistantMessage: Done. I've identified destination, dates, family group and room type. Building the proposal.

howItWorks.headline: From a conversation to an actionable proposal.
howItWorks.subheadline: Three steps. One language. Zero forms.

steps.title: Natural input
steps.copy: Users speak in free language — no forms, no required fields.

steps.title: Smart interpretation
steps.copy: Emilia detects destinations, dates, passengers, rooms and travel style.

steps.title: Structured, quotable output
steps.copy: Turns intent into a proposal ready to review, adjust or send.

differentiator.headline: Not just a tool. A new interface.

items.title: Not just inspiration
items.copy: It's action — structure and quoting in the same conversation.

items.title: Not just planning
items.copy: It's quoting — from idea to sale.

items.title: Not just another tool
items.copy: It's the new interface to understand and sell travel.

twoModes.headline: Two modes, one experience.
twoModes.subheadline: Emilia starts by planning and naturally evolves into quoting.

planner.title: Planner
planner.copy: Inspires, structures and turns the travel idea into actionable data.

quoter.title: Quoter
quoter.copy: Connects with providers and returns send-ready proposals.

solutions.headline: One interface, three ways to use it.
solutions.subheadline: Emilia adapts to whoever asks for it.

travelers.title: Travelers
travelers.copy: Shape your next trip in a conversation. No forms, no friction.

agencies.title: Agencies
agencies.copy: Reply faster, structure each request better and sell with less friction.

wholesalers.title: Wholesalers
wholesalers.copy: Bring Emilia into your B2B engine and give your agencies a more natural way to quote.

ecosystemNetwork.headline: Connected to multiple travel-industry providers.
ecosystemNetwork.subheadline: Emilia integrates the availability and pricing of the providers you already use, in one interface.

impact.headline: What changes when Emilia enters the flow.

items.title: More speed
items.copy: From idea to proposal in minutes.

items.title: Better experience
items.copy: A conversation that feels human end-to-end.

models.headline: Pick how you want to work with Emilia.
models.subheadline: Three ways to integrate Emilia, based on your role and product maturity.

saas.label: SaaS
saas.title: Emilia as a product
saas.copy: Access Emilia from our platform. No installation, ready to use.

embedded.label: Embedded
embedded.title: Emilia inside your product
embedded.copy: Embed the conversational interface into your B2B engine, with your brand and your providers.

api.label: API
api.title: Emilia as a layer
api.copy: Use Emilia's intelligence from your own frontend, via API.

aboutVibook.headline: We built the missing interface.
aboutVibook.copy: Vibook is a technology company focused on the travel industry. We combine conversational AI, industry data and product design to bring trip planning and selling to a more human, faster, more useful place.

finalCta.headline: Start planning your next trip with Emilia.
finalCta.microcopy: Opens the chat in planner mode. No forms.
